author: Augustine of Hippo
book: A Treatise on the Predestination of the Saints.

classification.cautionReason: No major mainstream heresy warning is attached by the preview classifier.

lineage: A Treatise on the Predestination of the Saints.
A Treatise on the Gift of Perseverance.
The Second Petition in the Lord’s Prayer.
originalBook: A Treatise on the Gift of Perseverance.
title: The Second Petition in the Lord’s Prayer.

verses.book: A Treatise on the Predestination of the Saints.
verses.text: What, when we say, “Thy kingdom come,” do we ask else, but that that should also come to us which we do not doubt will come to all saints?

verses.book: A Treatise on the Predestination of the Saints.
verses.text: And therefore here also, what do they who are already holy pray for, save that they may persevere in that holiness which has been given them?

verses.book: A Treatise on the Predestination of the Saints.
verses.text: For no otherwise will the kingdom of God come to them; which it is certain will come not to others, but to those who persevere to the end.
